title: The Yett Paradigm: A Geometric Foundation for Information Tension and Galactic Dynamics
description: Building upon the foundational OmegA Architecture for Sovereign AI and the Yett-Chyren Correspondence, this work provides the first formal mechanization of Information Tension in the Lean 4 proof assistant. We establish a unified geometric solution to the galactic rotation curve anomaly by mapping cognitive alignment dynamics onto the Stiefel manifold. This work bridges the gap between the millennium prize problems and sovereign intelligence orchestration, providing a computer-verified proof of asymptotic convergence to Newtonian dynamics under the 0.7 ADCCL threshold.
